column2: Converts formulas into formulas stored as text. The cell format is changed to 'Text'. Cells without formulas remain unchanged.

Converts references in formulas to relative references.
Converts date and time values stored as text into a real date, with time if applicable. The cell format is changed to 'General'.

Converts numbers stored as text into real numbers. The cell format is changed to 'General'.

Converts numeric values (numbers, date, time) into numbers stored as text. The cell format is changed to 'Text'.

Specifies that distance or angle is calculated for each shape individually from the center to the respective shape.\n\nThis function is useful to change the angle of a diagonal of shapes or to achieve a star-shaped arrangement of shapes.
Specifies that distance or angle is distributed evenly from the center and between each shape.\n\nThis function is useful to distribute several shapes along a diagonal or around a center.
Specifies that distance or angle is always changed by the same difference from the center to the respective shape.\n\nTemporary toggle possible with the ALT key.
Specifies that the first selected shape within the selection should be in the center.
Specifies that the last selected shape within the selection should be in the center.
